title: Podman can't start on Mac M1 with error message "qemu-system-x86_64: Unknown Error"
body:
### Bug description

**On my Mac M1, start podman get following error:**

`Error: Starting machine "podman-machine-default" Waiting for VM ... Error: qemu exited unexpectedly with exit code -1, stderr: qemu-system-x86_64: Unknown Error`

### Operating system

MacOS Ventura 13.3.1 Apple M1 Pro

### Version

0.15.0

### Steps to reproduce

_No response_

### Relevant log output

_No response_

### Additional context

_No response_

comments.body: Hello @LiZhang19817 https://stackoverflow.com/questions/73913805/qemu-exited-unexpectedly-with-exit-code-1-stderr-qemu-system-x86-64-unknown might help you. Probably you've something saying that you're on amd64 system and not arm64 system
@benoitf I am using the arm installer, what's the reason still seeing this issue?

@LiZhang19817 you may have qemu installed by your system/brew

could you provide the result of `type qemu-system-x86_64` and `arch` commands ?
transfefring the issue to podman repository as it's an issue with starting a podman machine
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
Most likely you have installed the x86 version of podman. Please try installing the latest arm version, either via the pkginstaller or  non-rosetta brew, and re-open if this issue still persists.
